LoginSubTitle: Access desktops, apps, and approvals in one place. Confirm gateway, network, and terminal status before signing in.
OtherLoginTip: Please use {{channel}} to scan the QR code and log in
SettingsServerSubtitle: Configure pre-login gateways and default access.
SettingsCommonSubtitle: Manage startup, display, updates, language, and theme.
SettingsAdvancedSubtitle: Review diagnostics, network, developer mode, and logs.
SettingsAboutSubtitle: Review client version, updates, license, and copyright.
NAME: Name
DELETE_ACCESS_GATEWAY_MSG: Are you sure to delete the access server {{name}} {{address}}?
NotStrongPSW: 6-20 characters, can input English uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (excluding spaces)
StrongPSW: 6-20 characters, supports keyboard symbols input, and must contain both uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters
SHUT_DOWN_DESK_MSG: Confirm to perform shutdown operation on desktop {{name}}?
POWER_ON_DESK_MSG: Are you sure to perform the boot operation on the desktop {{name}}?
SnapNamePlaceHolder: 2~20 characters, supporting English uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, Chinese characters, hyphens, and underscores
ApprovalWorkbenchEmptyDescription: No requests match the current filters. Refresh the list or create a new workflow request.
SureCreateDeskFromDeskPool: Are you sure to create desktop resources from the desktop pool {{name}}?
DESK_CONNECT_ERROR: Connect desktop failed, please try again later
SUCCESS_GATEWAY_SET_AUTO: Successfully set up automatic access to server {{name}}
SUCCESS_GATEWAY_CANCEL_AUTO: Successfully cancelled automatic access to server {{name}}
LoginErrorTimesExceed: The current user has made multiple consecutive login errors. Please try again after {{remainingSeconds}}s
NamePasswordNotMatchWithCount: The current username or password is incorrect, with {{remainLoginCount}} retries remaining
GatewayNameExists: The name already exists for accessing the server: {{name}}
GatewayAddressPortExists: The address connected to the server already exists: {{name}}
VAppOnlySupportExclusiveOrSharedPool: Vapp only support exclusive or shared-pool
AppInfomationUsbTip:
Clicking the minimize button on the virtual application will close the virtual application.
When using the virtual application, do not manually adjust the size of the virtual application window.
UserHasBindTerminalError: User {{username}} has been bound to terminal {{terminalName}} and cannot log in to the current device
ValidPhoneError: Please enter the correct phone number
ValidPhoneTip: You are attempting to retrieve the password for account {{phone}}. Please verify
SendPhoneLable: Click to obtain the verification code, and the SMS will be sent to the secure phone {{phone}}
ChangePhonePlaceHolder: Please enter a new phone number
ResetPwdSuccessInfo: Account {{user}} reset password successfully, please log in again
MalfunctionEmptyDescription: No tickets match the current filters. Refresh the list or create a new fault ticket.
CancedFaultMsg: Are you sure to withdraw the work order [{{title}}]?
CancedFaultBatchMsg: Are you sure to withdraw [{{count}}] work orders?
usbExpiringlotifyMsg: Authorization for USB peripheral {{name}} has {{minute}} minutes and {{second}} seconds left! If you need to continue using it, please resubmit the application!
usbExpiringlotifyMsg_noTime: The authorization for the use of USB peripheral {{name}} is about to end! If you need to continue using it, please resubmit the application!
usbExpiringlotifyMsg_noMinute: There are {{second}} seconds left to authorize the use of USB peripheral {{name}}! If you need to continue using it, please resubmit the application!
UsbExpired: Your USB peripheral request {{reason}} has expired and the desktop will disconnect and automatically reconnect.
LanguageSelectTip: This action will redirect to login page
InvalidVm.StatusAbnormal: Desktop status is abnormal, please try again later
CreateSnapShotTip: The data disk does not include the personal disk, and the personal disk does not support snapshotting
application_page.virtual_app_minimize_ti:
Clicking the minimize button on the virtual application will close the virtual application
When using the virtual application, do not manually adjust the size of the virtual application window
application_page.empty_description: No apps are available in the current category. Favorite a system app or publish a custom app.
application_page.vapp_name_rule: 2~20 characters, supports uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers, Chinese characters, hyphens, and underscores
application_page.vapp_path_placeholder: Please Enter the Full Installation Path of the Application
application_page.vapp_path_rule: Please Enter a Valid Application Path, e.g.: C:\Program Files (x86)\WXWork\WXWork.exe
application_page.vapp_description_rule: No more than 50 characters, supports uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers, Chinese characters, and special characters
application_page.select_upload_image_exi: Please do not upload the same image repeatedly
common.warning_shutdown_msg: Are you sure you want to shut down?
common.message_modal.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
config_page.server_setting.gateway_name_: Only 1-10 Chinese characters, letters, underscores or numbers are allowed
config_page.server_setting.public_networ: External network users generally need to enable public network proxy
config_page.server_setting.workbench_des: Manage server gateways used to connect to the desktop environment before login.
config_page.server_setting.network_state: Based on the current local network and connection state.
config_page.server_setting.gateway_list_: The default gateway is used first during login.
config_page.server_setting.empty_descrip: Add a server gateway to start connecting.
config_page.common_setting.preferences_d: Adjust startup, display, update, language, and theme behavior.
config_page.common_setting.startup_displ: Control launch behavior and window display.
config_page.common_setting.appearance_la: Switch interface language and theme mode.
config_page.common_setting.auto_start_de: Run the client automatically after system startup.
config_page.common_setting.auto_update_d: Automatically check for available client updates.
config_page.common_setting.language_desc: Language changes keep the existing reset behavior.
config_page.common_setting.theme_descrip: Choose light, dark, or system theme.
config_page.advanced_setting.log_path_ti: Client operation logs will be stored here
config_page.advanced_setting.clear_log_c: Are you sure to clear the log? (Log Size: {{logSize}})
config_page.advanced_setting.select_dir_: Please select a directory to save logs
config_page.advanced_setting.save_log_co: Log configuration saved successfully, will take effect next time you start the application
config_page.advanced_setting.dhcp_enable: Please select whether to enable DHCP
config_page.advanced_setting.ip_address_: Please enter a valid IP address
Each segment of the IP address must be between 0-255
config_page.advanced_setting.gateway_ip_: Please enter a valid gateway address
config_page.advanced_setting.subnet_mask: Please enter a valid subnet mask
Each segment of the subnet mask must be between 0-255
config_page.advanced_setting.operations_: Tools for troubleshooting, network review, developer mode, and logs.
config_page.advanced_setting.support_too: Collect diagnostics and review network information.
config_page.advanced_setting.developer_t: Enable log viewing and developer-oriented tools.
config_page.advanced_setting.diagnosis_d: Open diagnostics and collect troubleshooting details.
config_page.about.product_description: Review client version, update status, and license information.
config_page.about.version_info_descripti: Client identity, build details, and available updates.
config_page.about.license_description: License agreement content included with this client.
